prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Eri Moonvale (feminine ranger, green half-cape, compact bow case, leaf-shaped brooch) and Eri Oakspire (androgynous scout, cropped travel jacket, messenger straps, wind-tossed hair) standing at a wooden strategy table; Eri Moonvale spreads a detailed quest map across the table and points to a marked area in the Deep Ruins, while Eri Oakspire leans in closely to observe, placing a finger on a secondary route in agreement, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; after ten seconds, Eri Oakspire slides a brass compass onto the map to weigh it down, while Eri Moonvale places a small wooden token on the deployment point, both exchanging a professional nod of mutual understanding to finalize the strategy, consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
